conflicts.description: The workspace already has unrelated modifications in .fabric/audit.jsonl, .intent-ledger.jsonl, and packages/cli/src/scanner/tree-sitter-probe.ts.
conflicts.impact: Do not stage, revert, rewrite, or depend on these files during the TDD refactor plan. Avoid tree-sitter-based entity detection in v1.

conflicts.description: packages/server/src/services/plan-context.ts currently builds on get-rules matching/loading/payload helpers, but the locked protocol replaces full rule payloads with neutral description_index plus selection_token.
conflicts.impact: Plan tasks must first add Red tests for neutral plan-context output, then introduce lower-level registry/description helpers before deleting or bypassing the old get-rules payload model.

conflicts.description: Root pnpm -r --if-present test does not reliably run server/shared/dashboard tests because only packages/cli has a test script.
conflicts.impact: TDD tasks should either add package test scripts or specify direct vitest run paths for shared/server/dashboard red tests.

conflicts.description: The user approved discarding fab_get_rules, but docs, dashboard REST mirror, and server registration still refer to the old contract.
conflicts.impact: Create and test fab_get_rule_sections before removing registration/docs for fab_get_rules; include docs/dashboard follow-up tasks.

summary: Proceed with isolated TDD planning. Avoid unrelated WIP, keep v1 deterministic without tree-sitter dependency, generate tests before protocol changes, and sequence old API removal after new section API coverage.
